welcome.title: Ethnocare Online Tool
welcome.description: Select the tool you want to use
welcome.description1: The sizing tool aims to guide you in finding the right size of Ethnocare product.
welcome.description2: The assistance tool provides help and support for using Ethnocare products.
welcome.description3: The return tool allows you to manage returns and exchanges of Ethnocare products.
welcome.description4: The FAQ tool provides answers to frequently asked questions about Ethnocare products.
welcome.description5: The recommendation tool helps you find the best Ethnocare products based on your needs.

welcomeRecommendation.title: Solution Finder
welcomeRecommendation.description: Answer the following questions to get a personalized product recommendation

welcomeReturn.title: Return Tool
welcomeReturn.description: Use this tool to return a product

identificationReturn.title: Identification
identificationReturn.description: Are you a user/clinic or a distributor?

assistanceToolReturn.title: Assistance Tool
assistanceToolReturn.descriptionClinic: Did you try the troubleshooting steps provided in the assistance tool?
assistanceToolReturn.descriptionDistributor: Did the returnee try the troubleshooting steps provided in the assistance tool?

welcomeAssistance.title: Assistance Tool
welcomeAssistance.description: Use this tool to get help and support for using Ethnocare products

productAssistance.title: Product
productAssistance.description: Which product do you need assistance with?

problemAssistance.title: Problem
problemAssistance.description: Select the issue with your product

pressurePointsAssistance.title: Rotation
pressurePointsAssistance.description: Rotate your Overlay between 30 and 180 degrees

badFitAssistance.title: Bad Fit
badFitAssistance.description: What is the problem you are experiencing with the fit of your product?

movingAssistance.title: Overlay Slipping
movingAssistance.description: Does your Overlay slip on your liner?

stirrupAssistance.title: Stirrup
stirrupAssistance.imageDescription: The stirrup is designed specifically for when the integrated sillicone is not enough to hold the Overlay in place. This solution will keep your Overlay secure all day long.

otherAssistance.title: Contact Us
otherAssistance.description: It looks like we need more information to help you

welcomeSizing.title: Sizing Tool
welcomeSizing.description: Use this tool to find the right size of Ethnocare product for you

unitsSizing.title: Units
unitsSizing.description: Select your preferred units of measurement

productSizing.title: Product
productSizing.description: Select the product you want to find a size for

circumferenceTTSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTTSizing.description_metric: Measure the circumference (C) at 4 cm from the distal end
circumferenceTTSizing.description_imperial: Measure the circumference (C) at 1.5 in from the distal end

circumferenceTTVacSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTTVacSizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at the top of the seal

lengthTTSizing.title: Length
lengthTTSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the top of the seal to the popliteal trim line
lengthTTSizing.note_body: You can measure the length from the end of the liner to the popliteal fossa and report the dimensions above (Make sure to measure linear dimensions).

lengthTTVacSizing.title: Length
lengthTTVacSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the top of the seal to the popliteal trim line
lengthTTVacSizing.note_body: You can measure the length from the end of the liner to the popliteal fossa and report the dimensions above (Make sure to measure linear dimensions).

orientationTTSizing.title: Orientation
orientationTTSizing.note_body: Most users choose the same orientation as the side where the Overlay will be worn.

TTSizing.title: Size
TTSizing.email_description: Get your product code and fitting resources by email instantly.

lengthTFSizing.title: Length
lengthTFSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the end of the liner to the perineum

lengthTFVacSizing.title: Length
lengthTFVacSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the top of the seal to the perineum

circumferenceTFSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTFSizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at {{distance}} from the distal end

circumferenceTFVacSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTFVacSizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at {{distance}} from the top of the seal

TFSizing.title: Size
TFSizing.email_description: Get your product code and fitting resources by email instantly.
TFSizing.note_cushion_body: Cushion systems may require custom modifications to the Overlay. Please contact us at <bold>clinics@ethnocare.ca</bold> with your sizes and details about your suspension system.

sealUnderlaySizing.title: Seal Selection
sealUnderlaySizing.description: Choose where the seal will be done with your liner
sealUnderlaySizing.open_description: We recommend using the Open sealing position as it allows the underlay to stick above the liner and evacuate the excess humidity.
sealUnderlaySizing.closed_description: If you prefer a more classical design, or if liner sealing is a concern, you can choose the closed version.

lengthUnderlaySizing.title: Length
lengthUnderlaySizing.description: Measure the length (L) of your cut liner

circumferenceUnderlaySizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceUnderlaySizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at {{distance}} from the distal end

circumference2UnderlaySizing.title: Circumference
circumference2UnderlaySizing.description: Measure the upper liner circumference (C2) on the skin.

siliconeUnderlaySizing.title: Silicone
siliconeUnderlaySizing.image_caption: You can choose to add silicone for added grip on the liner and residual limb. This option is recommended for people who are concerned about underlay movement on the limb.

circumferenceLinerTTSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceLinerTTSizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at {{distance}} from the distal end
